_meta.dna: android(native) = material_you(adaptive) x play_store(distributed) x emulator(tested) x pwa(offline) x deep_links(integrated) x kotlin(first_class) x permission(granular)
_meta.question_expansion_instruction: Each floor lists 7 seed questions. Android is the largest mobile platform with billions of devices. These questions prepare for MVP+1 mobile deployment. Set up now, implement after desktop MVP ships. Every question should anticipate the mobile-first experience.
_meta.implementation_status: SETUP_ONLY — implement after MVP desktop launch

name: Tower of Android
protocol: FORECAST -> CROSS-REF -> AUDIT -> FIX -> VERIFY -> SEAL -> POSTMORTEM

questions: Is Android Studio installed with emulator images for testing?
